name: Black Olive Tapenade with Garlic Toasts
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Can pitted black olives, drained
4 ounces Can oil-cured Greek olives, pitted and drained
1 Baguette, sliced diagonally - rubbed lightly with garlic and toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, puree the black olives.
2. Add the capers, garlic, thyme, and Dijon mustard; puree again.
3. Transfer to a mixing bowl.
4. Add lemon juice and pepper to taste to the purée.
5. Stir in the parsley.
6. Serve surrounded by the garlic-toasted baguette slices.
Serves 6 to 8.
